title: Leaks of c/image/types.Image = persistent HTTP connections
body:
From a quick code inspection, not all callers of https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/6589be3ba189107e9389c8454951ff38fe9692ab/internal/source/source.go#L87 are calling `.Close()`.

https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/6589be3ba189107e9389c8454951ff38fe9692ab/internal/source/source.go#L76C27-L76C37 is not calling `ociSource.Close()`. That one could, in principle, leak persistent HTTP connections.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
